chat.connection_interrupted: Neural link interrupted. Please verify connectivity and retry protocol.

settings.title: System Configuration
settings.subtitle: DEVICE PREFERENCES
settings.navigation_app_sub: Preferred map provider for emergency routing
settings.auto_offline_bundle_sub: Cache Critical Data When Connectivity Drops
settings.privacy_note: SafeVixAI does not sell your data. All location data stays on-device or is transmitted only during active SOS dispatch.
settings.offline_cache_sub: First Aid · Hazard DB · Route Index

bystander.description: SafeVixAI will capture your location, guide you through first aid, call emergency services, and notify the nearest hospital — automatically.
bystander.footer_note: No login required · Works offline · Feeds accident into road reporter
bystander.steps_done_desc: You did everything right. Stay with the victim until help arrives.
bystander.follow_steps: Follow these steps — tap each one when done
bystander.tts_gps_capture: GPS is capturing your location. Stay calm.
bystander.tts_gps_success: Location captured. Follow the steps on screen. An ambulance call button is at the bottom.
bystander.tts_gps_fail: Location unavailable. Please call 112 and describe your surroundings.
bystander.report_description: [Bystander Mode] Road accident witnessed and auto-reported via SafeVixAI
bystander.report_failed: Could not auto-report accident. Your GPS is still captured — call emergency services below.

steps.step_1: STOP your vehicle safely. Turn on hazard lights.
steps.step_2: Do NOT move the victim — assume spinal injury.
steps.step_3: Call 108 (ambulance) RIGHT NOW. GPS location will be shared automatically.
steps.step_4: Check if victim is breathing — tilt head back, lift chin, watch for chest rise.
steps.step_5: If not breathing: start CPR — 30 hard chest compressions, then 2 breaths. Repeat.
steps.step_6: For severe bleeding: press clean cloth firmly on wound. Do NOT remove it.
steps.step_7: Keep the victim warm with any available jacket/cloth.
steps.step_8: Stay with them and talk to them until ambulance arrives.

report.title: Real-Time Road Hazard Reporting
report.subtitle: Uplinking live road intel to matching authorities. Precision reporting for safer transit networks.
report.approximate_location_warning: Your browser is giving an approximate location. You can still report, but a sharper GPS fix will improve road ownership matching.
report.optional_photo_hint: JPG, PNG, or WEBP. Optional, but it speeds up verification.
report.flag_hazard_title: Flag the hazard with live authority routing
report.notes_placeholder: Describe lane blockage, vehicle risk, traffic density, or how the hazard presents on the road.
report.report_uplinked_desc: Your hazard report has been successfully dispatched to the regional authority dashboard.
report.complaint_tagged: The report is now tagged to {{authority}} for the {{road}} network.
report.duplicate_detected: Duplicate Detected: A similar issue has already been reported here. Your feedback has been merged into the main ticket to escalate resolution priority!
report.platform_desc: Reports are dispatched to the correct road-owning authority using live GPS coordinates, real-time infrastructure data, and India's road ownership database. Your report helps make roads safer.
report.enable_location_authority: Enable location to match the exact road-owning authority.
report.unable_resolve_address: Unable to resolve a readable address for your current coordinates.
report.road_ownership_unavailable: Road ownership lookup is temporarily unavailable.
report.infra_data_unavailable: Road infrastructure data could not be loaded right now.
report.form_validation_error: Please select a hazard type and enable location before submitting.

issue_types.debris_desc: Objects blocking lanes or endangering traffic
issue_types.footpath_desc: Broken pavements or pedestrian path blockages
issue_types.markings_desc: Faded lanes, zebra crossing wear, missing paint
issue_types.signal_outage_desc: Traffic light dark, flashing, or broken
issue_types.missing_sign_desc: Stop, speed limits, or warning signs missing
issue_types.zebra_crossing_desc: Dangerous or faded crosswalks needing repair
issue_types.speed_bump_desc: Missing warning lines or broken speed calmers
issue_types.encroachment_desc: Vendors, illegal parking, or structural blocks
issue_types.dark_street_desc: Entire stretch or segment with dead streetlights
issue_types.bulb_out_desc: Single lamp post bulb burned out or dim
issue_types.pole_damage_desc: Critically tilted, rusted, or structurally unsafe pole
issue_types.electrical_hazard_desc: Exposed wires, open junction boxes, spark risk

locator.approximate_location_warning: Your browser is giving an approximate fix ({{accuracy}}). Live routes may be offset until precise GPS settles.
locator.approximate_location_warning_desktop: The browser is reporting an approximate fix ({{accuracy}}). If this still shows Chennai, the device or browser geolocation itself is returning Chennai-area coordinates.
locator.gps_permission_error: Unable to access your location. Enable GPS permissions in your browser settings.
locator.no_hospitals_5km: No hospitals in 5km — expanding search radius...
locator.loading_desc: Once the live backend responds, emergency resources will appear here.
locator.other_filter_desc: We found nearby resources within {{radius}}, but none matched the {{filter}} filter.
locator.radius_widened_desc: Search widened to {{radius}} and still found no matching services. Try refreshing your location or switching filters.
locator.fallback_desc: Try switching the filter or refreshing your location.
